title: Room Appearance Permissions & Ring Card Picker

changes.title: Ring picker redesigned as animated cards
changes.description: The avatar ring selection UI in the Style tab is now a row of cards. Each card shows your actual avatar photo inside a live-animated ring using the exact same CSS keyframes that other users see in chat — spinning conic gradients for Spin, Rainbow, Fire and Sparks; animated box-shadows for Glow, Pulse, Neon and Aura. A checkmark badge appears on the active card. The ring choice is saved to profile.json and visible to all other users.

changes.title: Room appearance permissions (owner/admin)
changes.description: A new Appearance Permissions section in Room Settings gives owners and admins two controls: a toggle to allow or block members from setting their own room backgrounds, and a forced-background grid to apply one gradient preset to every user in the room. When a forced background is set it overrides all individual preferences. When user customisation is disabled the room background section in the Style tab shows a lock notice and all buttons are greyed out.

changes.title: Room background respects owner settings on join
changes.description: _doJoinRoom now awaits loadRoomSettings before calling _applyRoomBg so appearance permissions are always available when the background is applied. _applyRoomBg checks in order: forced background set by owner, user customisation disabled (fall back to global), then user's local preference.
